title: 8 Habits a Man of God Builds Before Anyone Sees the Results
caption:
The habits that actually build a man don't look impressive while you're building them.

Nobody claps for the Bible before the phone. Nobody sees the prayer you said out loud in an empty room. Nobody notices the brother you texted the real thing to at 9 PM.

But those are the ones that change the interior. The ones that shape the man who then shows up in every other room — at work, with his family, under pressure, in private.

Pick two. Start this week. Don't announce them. Just do them.

Save this for the man who's serious about the kind of character that lasts.

#faith #discipline #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #thework #habits #christianity #scripture
